query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quotes' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('commissionPercent', 'commissionPercent2', 'marginPercent', 'rtPercent', 'freteValue', 'totalFinal') ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quotes' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('commissionPercent', 'commissionPercent2', 'marginPercent', 'rtPercent', 'freteValue', 'totalFinal') ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
rtPercent	decimal(5,4)	YES	0
marginPercent	decimal(5,4)	YES	0.10
totalFinal	decimal(12,2)	YES	0
commissionPercent	decimal(5,4)	NO	0.05
freteValue	decimal(10,2)	YES	0
commissionPercent2	decimal(5,4)	YES	0
